overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character wading through a shallow river at night, exploring the moonlit forested shoreline, and approaching a collectible herb. The scene features dramatic moonlight filtering through clouds and dense coniferous trees in a wilderness mountain setting.

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow river water toward the left bank, navigating around submerged rocks

entered.detail: dark flowing water reflecting the night sky
large gray boulders protruding from the water surface
dense pine trees lining the riverbanks
snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a nighttime river crossing in a wilderness area. The camera moves steadily through shallow water, navigating around large rocks while dense pine forests and distant mountains frame the scene under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: character exits the river onto the left bank, transitioning from water to dry land
moon becomes visible through the trees, creating dramatic backlighting on the hillside

agents.ego_description: climbing up the riverbank into the forested hillside, moving toward the moonlit tree line

entered.detail: bright full moon visible through gaps in the cloud cover and trees
grassy slope rising away from the river

segments.scene_description: The character exits the water and ascends a grassy hillside into denser forest. The lighting shifts dramatically as the moon becomes visible through the trees, casting long shadows across the terrain while the river falls away behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest interior with collectible herb

events.description: approaching a collectible herb, game UI prompt 'Pick and Examine Herb' appears

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense forest undergrowth approaching a small herb plant for collection

entered.detail: small glowing plant on the forest floor indicating an interactive item
large gray rock formation near the herb location
gnarled bare branches hanging low over the path

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the forest canopy, the scene becomes darker and more enclosed. The character approaches a collectible herb marked by a UI prompt, passing a large rock formation and under low-hanging dead branches as the moon becomes obscured by the dense tree cover.

events.description: returning to the river's edge, exiting the dense forest
camera passes directly under large dead tree branches that temporarily obscure the view

agents.ego_description: moving back down to the river shore and wading under overhanging branches

entered.detail: calm dark water at the river's edge

segments.scene_description: The character descends back to the river, passing under gnarled dead tree branches that create a brief occlusion. The scene opens back up to the wide river view with the moon illuminating the water surface, completing the exploration loop along the shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit river crossing into a dense forest interior before returning to the open shoreline. It begins by wading through shallow water and navigating around large rocks, with distant mountains framing the wilderness under a partly cloudy night sky. As the character exits the river and ascends a grassy hillside, the lighting shifts dramatically when the moon emerges through the trees to cast long shadows across the terrain. The scene then becomes darker and more enclosed as the camera moves deeper into the forest canopy, passing under low-hanging dead branches toward a collectible herb. Finally, the path descends back toward the water, passing through a brief occlusion of gnarled branches before opening back up to the wide river view illuminated by the moon.
